title: Interpretation Policy (proteomics overrides)
description: Proteomics overlay (plan S3.16). Carries verifiableEntities tuned for UniProt accessions + PRIDE/MASSIVE accessions + PTM-aware vocab + LFQ/TMT/iBAQ effect-size columns, plus the proteomics-specific evidenceRules. Shared claim-boundary shape is validated against `_policy-skeleton.schema.json` by the loader.

entityNamePatterns.description: Regular expressions identifying entity names in narrative prose. For proteomics this includes UniProt accessions, PRIDE/MASSIVE dataset IDs, and ontology IDs (GO, Reactome, KEGG).

effectSizeColumns.description: Column headers where effect sizes appear. For proteomics this includes LFQ/TMT/iBAQ ratio columns alongside standard logFC.

entityColumns.description: Column headers where entity names appear. For proteomics this includes UniProt accession columns and PTM-site columns.
